---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# What specifically caused this unmixing error

- Current quality control algorithms focus on detecting fluidic and laser issues

- Despite critical importance fluorescent signatures, few tools exist to preemptively screen unmixing controls before unmixing

- Whether its vial tandem fluorophore degrading, an additional autofluorescence, or instrument QC issue, left to stare at unmixing error without easy approach to discern cause. 

- Introduced unmixing errors loss resolution, conflicts downstream for unsupervised algorithms attempting to normalize, cluster and dimensionality visualize.
